课程编号
00320052
课程名：
三维可视化技术基础及应用
总学时：
32
总学分：
2
课程内容简介：
三维可视化将计算机图形生成、图像处理和人机交互技术结合，在三维图形世界中直接对形体信息进行交互操作，应用于医学、工业产品设计、影视制作、游戏渲染、地球科学、流体力学、军事、气象、艺术创作等诸多学科领域。随着三维成像和虚拟现实技术的快速发展，三维可视化与众多学科和专业交叉衍生出新的研究课题和方向。 通过课程教学，学习三维数据可视化原理；三维建模方法、OpenGL三维绘制流水线技术、三维动画原理、W三维可视化经典算法、混合现实MR/AR三维显示；通过参观实践活动了解三维可视化技术应用和前沿研究进展。 课程旨在培养学生以三维可视化表达科学数据和设计思想的能力，扩展学科视野。同学们可把所学知识应用于专业学习研究与创新课题。
Course Description
3D visualization combines graphics generation technology, image processing technology and human-computer interaction technology to enable people to directly manipulate information in the three-dimensional world, and communicate directly through computers in the three-dimensional graphics. 3D visualization has been applied in the fields of medicine, architecture, product design, earth sciences, fluid mechanics, military, meteorology, etc. Therefore, three-dimensional visualization technology can intersect with many disciplines and professions and derive new research topics and directions. This course starts from the establishment of the basic concepts of 3D visualization technology, combined with computer graphics and computer image processing technology, and systematically describes the basic theories, typical algorithm methods, application fields and development trends of 3D visualization technology. Through the course, you can learn the principles of 3D visualization, broaden your horizons to understand the frontier research progress of visualization, learn OPENGL 3D technology and basic program development methods, understand classic 3D visualization algorithms, understand 3D visualization industry applications through practical visits, and experience Hololens mixed reality (MR) 3D display technology, understand 3D visualization open source software and application development methods, and train students to eventually have the ability to use 3D visualization technology to solve their own professional related topics. This course is based on the Ministry of Education's Key Laboratory of Radiation Imaging, which has 3D visualization teaching platform, Hololens mixed reality development system, and high-performance graphics computers. At the same time, the Radiation Imaging CT Laboratory provides multiple sets of 3D CT raw data as learning materials.
进度安排：
课程结合前沿学术科研讲授三维可视化原理，旨在培养学生以三维形式表达科学数据和设计思想的能力，锻炼自由创新创意设计，并有助于同学近距离了解三维成像专业研究领域，培养三维数据显示与处理、三维建模与三维重建、虚拟现实交互、图像图形相关算法研究能力。
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
考核方式：
考查
教材及参考书：
课程紧随可视化前沿技术发展，以课堂讲义为主要学习资料，推荐课外阅读材料。
